AI made work lonely.

We used to design & code together but now it feels faster to just prompt.

But why not prompt together?

Well, that’s a hard problem. Who’s prompt go first? What if they’re conflicting? How do you merge?

Agent 4 fixes this.

x.name: Matt Turck
x.bio: VC at @FirstMarkCap.  Host: MAD Podcast; Organizer: Data Driven NYC, Author: MAD Landscape.

tweets.text:
Software never was a just product; it was always a solution. 

Beyond the functionality, you’d buy

1) insurance that someone would keep thinking and iterating though the problem for years 

2) a team to install the thing for you (in most cases)

3) someone to call if the thing
2028: no idea, let me ask my agent what it's been building

Length of product roadmaps

2022: 1 year
2024: 6 months
2026: 1 week
